name_en: M82132 Misty Blue! [Pocket Card Case Wallet] 'Porto Cult LV Charm' made of Monogram Unplant leather. Features 2 card slots on each side and 1 large slot in the middle, totaling 5 slots, making it a practical item for daily use. Decorated with 2 Monogram Flower pendants, adding a very feminine impression.
name_cn:
M82132 Misty Blue! [Pocket Card Case Wallet] 'Porto Cult LV Charm' made of Monogram Unplant leather. Features 2 card slots on each side and 1 large slot in the middle, totaling 5 slots, making it a practical item for daily use. Decorated with 2 Monogram Flower pendants, adding a very feminine impression.
Size: 10.2 x 7.3 x 0.3 cm.
